literature_check_status: NOT RUN. Per [[feedback_literature_novelty_check_baseline]], search/literature_check.py::check_literature() requires a live injected SearchFn and MUST be run against every cluster with ready_for_literature_check=true before any 'novel' claim -- this analysis pass only confirms the structural matcher engages (non-empty anchor pool via literature_anchors_engaged()), it does not itself search or adjudicate novelty. Not-found is necessary, not sufficient.
